sentence_reviews.text: Workflow and cluster orchestration allocate resources, schedule jobs, express dependencies, retry failures, and coordinate multi-stage ML pipelines.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: DDIA supports distributed jobs, coordination, failures, and dependencies; ML pipeline coordination is synthesized from systems and ML references.
sentence_reviews.notes: A workflow scheduler or cluster orchestrator source would be needed for exact verification.

sentence_reviews.text: Operational gains introduce new failure modes in concurrency, versioning, security, numerical behavior, observability, and cost. Its direct dependencies include Distributed systems & networking, Programs, ASTs, bytecode & intermediate representations.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.

sentence_reviews.text: In this atlas graph, Workflow, cluster & job orchestration is modeled as depending on Distributed systems & networking, Programs, ASTs, bytecode & intermediate representations and feeding downstream nodes such as Model registry, versioning & MLOps / LLMOps, Multi-agent systems & organizational intelligence, Simulation farms, digital environments & scenario generation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: data/atlas.json canonical node and dependency graph; generated from node dependencies and downstream consumers.
sentence_reviews.notes: This is an explicit internal atlas-graph positioning claim, not an external-world necessity claim.
